current_status.basis: Daylight v20 public evidence intake is active and public claim surfaces require external evidence before stronger claims.
current_status.non_claim: This is not Department of War approval, cATO authorization, RMF authorization, FIPS validation, production authority, external certification, independent audit completion, or operational deployment readiness.

score_rule: The defense-assurance roadmap does not raise the Daylight score by itself. Documentation creates obligations, not credit. Credit can only be assigned when evidence closes a registered obligation and the verifier can re-derive the result.

phases.name: Claim Boundary Lock
required_evidence: README and site claim surfaces checked
phases.exit_condition: No unsupported certification, production, PQ, DoW, cATO, RMF, or FIPS claim exists.

phases.name: Reproducible Build Authority
phases.exit_condition: A non-author, external rebuild receipt verifies through the Daylight v20 external evidence path.

phases.name: Independent Verifier Quorum
phases.objective: Prove verifier agreement beyond the repository-owned implementation.
phases.exit_condition: The v20 3-of-3 verifier-family quorum gate closes without manual scoring.

phases.name: Security Review and Falsification
phases.objective: Expose the system to real adversarial review.
phases.exit_condition: All findings are either fixed, documented as accepted risk, or converted into explicit blockers.

phases.name: Cryptographic Review
phases.objective: Separate research cryptography from production cryptography.
phases.exit_condition: The project either remains clearly research-only or has a documented validated-crypto migration path.

phases.name: Supply Chain and SBOM Maturity
phases.objective: Make the full build and dependency chain inspectable.
phases.exit_condition: A reviewer can trace source, toolchain, dependencies, build outputs, and release artifacts without relying on author assertion.

phases.name: Operational Monitoring Model
phases.objective: Define what continuous monitoring would mean if the system entered a real mission environment.
phases.exit_condition: The project has a documented cATO-style monitoring model, but still does not claim cATO authorization.

phases.name: RMF / Control Mapping
phases.objective: Map Wuci-Ji / Daylight evidence to public control families without claiming equivalency.
phases.exit_condition: The mapping exists as a review aid and clearly states that mapping is not authorization.

phases.name: Deployment Boundary
phases.objective: Define where the system could safely run.
phases.exit_condition: No deployment is recommended outside the documented supported boundary.

phases.name: External Authority Package
phases.objective: Prepare materials that an external organization could review.
phases.exit_condition: The repository contains a complete public review packet without claiming approval.

phases.name: Candidate Defense System Review
phases.objective: Only after all prior phases, describe the project as a candidate for formal defense review.
phases.exit_condition: The project may say high-assurance defense-system candidate for external review, not Department of War system.

warning_levels.BLUE: Externally reviewable; independent evidence intake active.
warning_levels.GREEN: External review complete within defined scope; no unresolved findings.
warning_levels.GOLD: Formal authority exists from an actual external authority.
